channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [FGP] FGP Q4/FY26 Results Approved; Directors Re/Appointed
item.description:
FGP Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified opinion. The Board also approved the re-appointment of Ms. Shweta Ratnakar Musale as an Independent Director for a second five-year term and the appointment of Mr. Pradeep Shashikant Pathare as an Additional Independent Director for a five-year term, both subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, the company revised its Code of Fair Disclosure and announced that the 64th AGM details would be intimated separately.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 with unmodified opinion.
  • Ms. Shweta Musale re-appointed as Independent Director for a second 5-year term.
  • Mr. Pradeep Pathare appointed as Additional Independent Director for 5 years.
  • Both director appointments are subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Company revised its Code of Fair Disclosure and Insider Trading Policy.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FGP LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ODYSSEY] Odyssey Tech Q4 PAT ₹171.45 L, FY26 PAT ₹402.33 L
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Odyssey Technologies Ltd reported its audited financial results for Q4 and the full year ended March 31, 2026. For Q4 FY26, the company recorded a Profit After Tax (PAT) of ₹171.45 Lakhs on revenue from operations of ₹766.07 Lakhs, a significant increase from the previous quarter's PAT of ₹91.14 Lakhs. On a year-over-year basis, Q4 FY26 PAT saw a slight increase from ₹170.50 Lakhs in Q4 FY25. For the full fiscal year 2026, the company posted a PAT of ₹402.33 Lakhs, a decrease from ₹433.13 Lakhs in FY25, despite a slight increase in revenue from operations to ₹2,730.18 Lakhs from ₹2,725.69 Lakhs in FY25. Basic EPS for FY26 stood at ₹2.53.

  • Q4 FY26 PAT increased to ₹171.45 Lakhs from ₹91.14 Lakhs in Q3 FY26.
  • Q4 FY26 revenue from operations rose to ₹766.07 Lakhs.
  • Full year FY26 PAT was ₹402.33 Lakhs, down from ₹433.13 Lakhs in FY25.
  • FY26 revenue from operations slightly increased to ₹2,730.18 Lakhs.
  • Basic EPS for FY26 stood at ₹2.53.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ODYSSEY TECHNOLOGIES LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [FGP] FGP Ltd Approves Q4/FY26 Results; Appoints New Independent Director
item.description:
FGP Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified audit opinion. The board also approved the appointment of Mr. Pradeep Shashikant Pathare as an Additional Non-Executive Independent Director for a five-year term, subject to shareholder approval. Concurrently, Ms. Shweta Ratnakar Musale was re-appointed as an Independent Director for a second five-year term, also pending shareholder approval. Furthermore, revisions to the Code of Fair Disclosure and Insider Trading Policy were approved, and details for the 64th Annual General Meeting will be announced separately.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY ended March 31, 2026.
  • Mr. Pradeep Shashikant Pathare appointed as Additional Independent Director.
  • Ms. Shweta Ratnakar Musale re-appointed as Independent Director for second term.
  • Revised Code of Fair Disclosure and Insider Trading Policy approved.
  • Details for the 64th Annual General Meeting to be intimated separately.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FGP LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SYNGENE] Syngene Appoints S. R. Batliboi & Associates LLP as Statutory Auditors
item.description:
Syngene International Ltd.'s Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. They recommended a final dividend of ₹1.25 per equity share (face value ₹10) for FY26, with June 26, 2026, as the record date. Subject to shareholder approval, M/s S. R. Batliboi & Associates LLP were appointed as statutory auditors for a five-year term, commencing from the 33rd Annual General Meeting (AGM) until the 2031 AGM. The 33rd AGM is scheduled for July 29, 2026. The board also approved managerial remuneration for Ms. Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw.

  • Board approved Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Recommended final dividend of ₹1.25 per equity share for FY26.
  • S. R. Batliboi & Associates LLP appointed as statutory auditors for 5 years.
  • 33rd Annual General Meeting scheduled for July 29, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Syngene International Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [MOTILALOFS] Motilal Oswal Board Approves Promoter Group Reclassification to Public
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd. approved the request from certain promoter group members, Smt. Ansi Devi Oswal and Mr. Taverilal Oswal, for reclassification from the 'Promoter Group' category to the 'Public' category. This reclassification is subject to approvals from stock exchanges, shareholders, and other regulatory authorities. The Board meeting also approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, and the appointment of Mrs. Smita Bhagat as an Additional Director (Independent Director) effective July 1, 2026. Additionally, amendments to the 'Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosure of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information’ were approved.

  • Board approved reclassification of certain promoters to 'Public' category.
  • Smt. Ansi Devi Oswal and Mr. Taverilal Oswal are seeking reclassification.
  • Reclassification is pending approvals from exchanges and shareholders.
  • Audited financial results for Q4/FY26 were also approved.
  • Mrs. Smita Bhagat appointed as Additional Independent Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MOTILAL OSWAL FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Promoter Reclassification

item.title: [BANKINDIA] Bank of India revises Fixed Rate Spread effective May 1, 2026
item.description:
Bank of India announced changes to its lending rates, effective May 1, 2026. The Marginal Cost of Fund based Lending Rate (MCLR) and Repo Based Lending Rate (RBLR) will remain unchanged. However, the Fixed Rate Spread (FRS) has been revised. For a 1-year tenor, the new rate is 8.75% plus Credit Risk Premium (CRP). For 2-year, it is 9.25%+CRP; for 3-year, 9.60%+CRP; and for 5-year, 10.00%+CRP. For tenors above 5 years, the rate will be 8.75% plus Tenor Premium and CRP. This adjustment impacts the bank's fixed-rate loan products.

  • Bank of India revises Fixed Rate Spread effective May 1, 2026.
  • Marginal Cost of Fund based Lending Rate (MCLR) remains unchanged.
  • Repo Based Lending Rate (RBLR) also remains unchanged.
  • New FRS rates introduced for various tenors from 1 to over 5 years.
  • The 5-year FRS is set at 10.00% plus Credit Risk Premium.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BANK OF INDIA | Category: Price Update

item.title: [BRIGADE] Brigade & Bain Capital JV for 2 Mn Sq Ft mixed-use project in Bengaluru
item.description:
Brigade Group announced a strategic 50:50 joint venture with Bain Capital to develop a premium mixed-use project in Whitefield, Bengaluru. The project, on an 11-acre land parcel adjacent to the Whitefield Metro Station, will comprise approximately 2 Mn Sq Ft of Grade A office space and a five-star hotel. The total project investment is estimated at approximately ₹2200 Cr. This collaboration aims to meet the rising demand for quality commercial and hospitality infrastructure in Bengaluru's technology corridor, strengthening Brigade's commercial portfolio and marking a significant investment by Bain Capital in Indian real estate.

  • Brigade Group and Bain Capital formed a 50:50 joint venture.
  • The JV will develop a 2 Mn Sq Ft mixed-use project in Bengaluru.
  • Total project investment is estimated at approximately ₹2200 Cr.
  • Project includes Grade A office space and a five-star hotel.
  • Strengthens Brigade's portfolio and expands Bain Capital's India real estate presence.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BRIGADE ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: Joint Venture

item.title: [PIGL] Power & Instrumentation Bags ₹2.61 Cr Order for Udaipur Air Terminal
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Power and Instrumentation (Gujarat) Ltd has secured two new work orders totaling ₹2.61 crore (including GST) from Nyati Engineering & Consultants Private Limited. These orders are for the design, supply, installation, testing, commissioning, and client handover of power supply system electrical work at the Udaipur Air Terminal in Rajasthan. This latest award increases the aggregate value for the Udaipur Air Terminal project to ₹60.51 crore, building on previous orders. The project is expected to be completed within 4-8 weeks from the approval of the General Arrangement drawing.

  • Company received new work orders worth ₹2.61 crore (including GST).
  • Orders are for electrical work at the Udaipur Air Terminal, Rajasthan.
  • Aggregate project value for Udaipur Air Terminal now stands at ₹60.51 crore.
  • The orders were awarded by domestic entity Nyati Engineering & Consultants Private Limited.
  • Project completion is expected within 4-8 weeks from drawing approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Power and Instrumentation (Gujarat) Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SATINDLTD] Aeroflex to Divest 68% Stake in MRO for ₹22,742 Lakhs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Aeroflex Enterprises Limited's Board has approved the sale of its 68% equity stake in subsidiary M.R. Organisation Limited (MRO) to INGERSOLL-RAND INDUSTRIAL U.S., INC. for a cash consideration of ₹22,742 lakhs. This strategic move marks Aeroflex's exit from the compressor parts and services business, with MRO ceasing to be a subsidiary upon transaction completion. The deal, which is not a related party transaction, is subject to customary closing conditions and is expected to conclude within 120 days. In FY2024-2025, MRO contributed 13.53% to Aeroflex's consolidated turnover and 7.34% to its net worth. Shareholder approval was obtained on January 27, 2026.

  • Aeroflex to sell 68% equity stake in subsidiary M.R. Organisation Limited.
  • Sale consideration is ₹22,742 lakhs in cash.
  • Buyer is Ingersoll-Rand Industrial U.S., Inc., not a related party.
  • MRO contributed 13.53% of turnover and 7.34% of net worth in FY25.
  • Transaction expected to complete within 120 days of agreement signing.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAT INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Divestment

item.title: [BGPL] String Metaverse approves 2:9 bonus issue for public shareholders
item.description:
🔥 Trending

String Metaverse Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 29, 2026, approved and recommended a bonus issue of equity shares exclusively to public shareholders. The bonus will be issued in the ratio of 02:09 (Two bonus shares for every Nine existing shares) of ₹1/- each, by capitalizing free reserves and securities premium. This move aims to achieve compliance with Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS) requirements, with promoters and promoter group shareholders forgoing their entitlement. Consequently, the Board also approved the withdrawal of the previously contemplated Rights Issue application, which was also for MPS compliance. A postal ballot will be conducted for shareholder approval, and a scrutinizer has been appointed.

  • Board approved 2:9 bonus shares for public shareholders.
  • Bonus issue aims for Minimum Public Shareholding compliance.
  • Promoters will forgo their bonus share entitlement.
  • Company withdrew its earlier proposed Rights Issue application.
  • Postal Ballot approved for shareholder approval of bonus issue.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bio Green Papers Ltd | Category: Bonus
